description: Spice up your style with this fashionable, and spacious wallet from fastrack. It's well organised to allow you to carry all your essentials conveniently and it looks absolutely fabulous with any outfit, upping your style statement.Dimensions : 9 cm x 12 cmMade of leatherette in blackTwo main compartmentsFour insert pocketsMulti card slots insideOne id card holderOne zippered pocketBrand name appliqued on the frontCareWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
